overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring the area around the Arc de Triomphe in Paris. The character walks from a stone wall to the monument, explores the surrounding avenue, and circles around the Arc while the camera follows smoothly.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching Arc de Triomphe

events.description: character stops walking and stands still in front of the Arc de Triomphe

agents.ego_description: walking from a stone wall toward the Arc de Triomphe, then stopping to face the monument

entered.detail: low stone barrier wall at the edge of the plaza
large historic stone triumphal arch with sculptural reliefs
green leafy trees surrounding the plaza area
classic Parisian stone buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: The character begins near a stone wall in an open plaza with the Arc de Triomphe visible in the distance. She walks forward across the cobblestone ground toward the monument, passing trees on the left, and stops in front of the Arc to look up at it.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide tree-lined avenue leading away from the monument

events.description: character stops walking away and turns around to walk back toward the Arc
dark sedan drives past on the left side of the avenue

agents.ego_description: walking away from the Arc down the avenue, then turning around and walking back toward the monument

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the avenue from left to right

entered.detail: rows of trees lining both sides of the wide avenue
historic stone apartment buildings with traditional architecture

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the Arc de Triomphe down a wide tree-lined avenue with historic Parisian buildings on the right. A car passes by on the left. After walking some distance, the character turns around and begins walking back toward the monument.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza immediately surrounding the Arc de Triomphe

events.description: character begins circling around the Arc de Triomphe in a counter-clockwise direction

agents.ego_description: walking back to the Arc and then circling around it to view the monument from multiple angles and sides

entered.detail: the monument reappears as the character walks back toward it

segments.scene_description: Returning to the Arc de Triomphe, the character walks around the monument in a circular path, viewing the detailed stone sculptures and reliefs from various angles. The camera follows the character as she orbits the historic structure, with the plaza's cobblestone ground visible throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a Parisian plaza that transitions from a distant approach to the Arc de Triomphe into a detailed exploration of the monument and its surrounding avenue. It begins with the character walking across a cobblestone plaza from a stone wall toward the distant monument, passing a row of trees before coming to a stop directly beneath the arch. As the character moves away, the scene opens into a wide, tree-lined avenue flanked by historic buildings where a car passes by, before she turns back toward the center of the plaza. The camera then follows her as she returns to the Arc de Triomphe, shifting into a circular orbit around the structure to reveal the intricate stone sculptures and reliefs from multiple angles.
